params.name: Basic Chemistry
params.description:
On Apr 29, 1789 AD, Lavoisier published his work.
It is a summary of Lavoisier's academic views. In the book, he proposed the concept of elements based on the theory of oxidation and the law of mass conservation. He classified commonly known chemical substances and summarized thirty-three elements, making the scattered chemical knowledge gradually clear. He also provided a complete explanation of his experimental results and theories, and his work was listed with the mathematical principles o …
